channel.title: Profile on OKH@nd's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Profile on OKH@nd's Blog

item.title: About_Me
item.description: Hi 👋, I'm OKH@nd Automation Developer from Taiwan Work Experience: Automation Developer, SIT, Foxconn, Mar.2023 ~ Present 1. Design, develop, and maintain test automation codebase such as Python/Bash/Powershell scripts 2. Experience in manual/automation testing of server centric/rack-level validation 3. Extensive communication and collaboration with stakeholders from firmware/BIOS/BMC/Silicon-Vendor teams for planning and developing solutions. System Integration Testing Engineer, SIT, Foxconn, Nov.2021 ~ Mar.2023 1. Responsible for x86-64 and arm server operation test 2.
